name: Project
description: [Retired — use /project-claude or /project-copilot instead] Build, edit, or inspect a project.yaml AI configuration via numbered-menu wizard or verb commands (add/set/remove/unset/show/validate).
system_prompt_fragment: Manage project.yaml configuration. Verbs: add (add a new key/section), set (update an existing value), remove (delete a key), unset (clear a value to default), show (display current config), validate (check against schema). If invoked without a verb, show a numbered menu of options. Write changes to project.yaml in the repo root. Validate after every write.

inputs.name: verb
inputs.description: add | set | remove | unset | show | validate
